hero.title: Your AI-Powered
hero.subtitle: With AI assistants you can
hero.subtitleHighlight: query real-time stock data, manage watchlists, set price alerts, and write research notes

demo.title: From analysis to action, in one message
demo.userMessage: Analyze TSMC's latest earnings. Add to watchlist if worth tracking, and alert me at a fair price
demo.aiResponse:
TSMC (2330) Analysis:

2025 Q3 EPS NT$17.44 (YoY +39%), trailing 4Q total NT$61.2. Current price NT$1,915, P/E ~31x. Jan revenue NT$401.3B (YoY +36.8%), growth remains strong but decelerating.

✅ Added to "Close Watch" watchlist
✅ Price alert set: notify at NT$1,800
✅ Note saved: 2025Q3 EPS 17.44, P/E 31x, watch for growth slowdown

claudeAi.title: Claude.ai
claudeAi.description: Use directly on the web, the easiest way to start
claudeAi.step1: Open Claude.ai, go to Settings → Connectors
claudeAi.step2: Click Add custom connector, enter the Fugle MCP Server URL

claudeCode.title: Claude Code
claudeCode.description: Use in the terminal, the efficient choice for developers
claudeCode.step2: Run the command to add Fugle MCP Server
claudeCode.step3: Enter /mcp to complete OAuth, start chatting

developer.title: Developers
